annotations.comment: This annotation is inside hunk 1 (visible by default). It targets the APP_VERSION change.
This annotation targets the padLeft/padRight functions in section 2 — deep inside the 89-line collapsed region between hunks 1 and 2. Auto-expand should reveal it.
This annotation targets the median/standardDeviation functions in section 4 — deep inside the 84-line collapsed region between hunks 2 and 3. Auto-expand should reveal it.
